boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: emergency exception fully scoped to vendor, amount, date, and invoice.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: closure not achieved per current source records
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: dependency exception scope must cover exact action remains open per SRC-C7BDEE54413D-CTL
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: exception scope missing or mismatched for the exact action per CTL; no source closes this dependency

final_answer: The action cannot proceed. Source control record SRC-C7BDEE54413D-CTL explicitly confirms the exception scope dependency remains open and unclosed for this exact action. Source SRC-C7BDEE54413D-POL requires current source records to close the exact requested action boundary before execution. Source SRC-C7BDEE54413D-BND establishes that tone, urgency, or prior history cannot substitute for source-control authority. Prior vendor history and urgent request framing do not close the dependency. Escalation required to resolve the missing exception scope before any AP execution.
open_blockers: exception scope must cover exact action
no source authority for current action boundary
